Home.title: Onside
Home.tagline: Find a nearby pickup football match, join, play with balanced teams, track your stats.

Auth.nicknamePrompt: Pick a nickname to start. You can add an email later to secure your account.
Auth.nicknameFormat: 3-20 characters; only lowercase letters, digits, and underscore (_)
Auth.anonNotice: Your account is stored anonymously on this device. Clearing browser data will lose it.

Geolocation.title: Use your location?
Geolocation.description: We'll use it to show the closest venues and matches. If you decline, we'll fall back to Warsaw center.
Geolocation.note: Your location stays on your device; we only re-center the map.

Chat.title: Chat
Chat.scope: Only approved roster and the organizer can see and post.
Chat.empty: No messages yet. Be the first!
Chat.placeholder: Type a message… (Enter to send, Shift+Enter for newline)
Chat.notInRoster: You need to be approved to chat.
Chat.locked: The organizer has locked this chat.
Chat.reportDescription: Why are you reporting this? The moderation team will review.

Roster.emptyJoinerHint: Be the first — pick your position and send a request.
Roster.lockedNoCancel: No cancellation after teams are formed
Roster.pickPositionDesc: What position do you want to play?
Roster.myPendingTitle: Your join request is awaiting approval

Cookie.title: Cookie notice
Cookie.body: Onside only uses essential cookies to keep you signed in. No ads or analytics cookies.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.draftBody: This is a draft for MVP; will be finalised with legal counsel before production.

collected.title: Data we collect
collected.intro: Onside applies data minimisation. We collect:
collected.item1: Anonymous session identifier (UUID issued by Supabase Auth — contains no personal info)
collected.item2: Profile info: nickname, display name, bio, preferred position, skill level (entered by you)
collected.item3: Event activity: RSVPs, chat messages, match stats, MVP votes
collected.item4: Location (optional): browser geolocation only to centre the map; never stored on server
collected.notCollectedList: We do NOT collect email, phone, payment info, IP-based tracking, or third-party advertising cookies.

purpose.title: Why we process data
purpose.body: To find matches near you, manage rosters, run chat and team-balancing, store Elo history and MVP stats. Never used for advertising, profiling, or sale.

storage.title: Where data is stored
storage.body: All data lives in Supabase Cloud (eu-central-1, Frankfurt — within GDPR boundaries). Backups are encrypted in the same region.

retention.title: Retention
retention.body: Anonymous session stays active for 30 days; if you don't open the app within that window, the profile becomes unreachable. Active profile data is kept until you close your account. Chat messages are soft-deleted; event deletion cascades.

rights.title: Your rights (GDPR)
rights.intro: If you live in or are a citizen of the EU, you have:
rights.access: Access — contact us for a downloadable copy
rights.complaint: The right to lodge a complaint with your data-protection authority

contact.title: Contact
contact.body: Data controller contact: contact@onside.example (placeholder — replace with real address before production).

terms.title: Terms of Service
terms.draftBody: This is a draft for MVP; will be finalised with legal counsel before production.

eligibility.title: Age & eligibility
eligibility.body: Onside is for users 16 and older. By creating an account you confirm you're 16+. Pickup football is physical activity; assess your own health conditions.

account.title: Account
account.body: Your account is anonymously bound to the device. Clearing browser data or switching devices permanently loses your profile + history. "Save my account" arrives in a future release.

conduct.title: Conduct
conduct.intro: These are forbidden and may lead to suspension:
conduct.item3: Selling, transferring, or operating multiple accounts
conduct.item4: Repeated no-shows — 3+ no-shows trigger automatic review

liability.title: Liability
liability.body: Onside is a discovery platform — it doesn't reserve pitches, take payments, or provide insurance. Injuries or damage during events are users' own responsibility. Relations with pitch owners/operators are between users.

changes.title: Changes
changes.body: These terms may be updated; significant changes will be sent as in-app notifications.

Stats.recentEmptyHint: After your first match, your W/L history, goals, and Elo changes will appear here.
Stats.chartEmptyHint: As you play, your rating changes will be plotted on a timeline here.

Result.title: Match result
Result.description: Match over? Submit the score; Elo updates automatically and MVP voting opens (7 days).
Result.editWindowFull: Score can be edited within 24 hours.
Result.waitingForKickoff: You can submit the score once the match has started.

Mvp.title: MVP voting
Mvp.openHint: Attended players can vote for best performance ({total} votes so far).
Mvp.closedHint: Voting window closed ({total} votes). Organizer can finalize.
Mvp.tieWarning: There's a tie — pick one of the candidates manually using the crown icon.
Mvp.noVotes: No votes received; closed without an MVP.

Teams.title: Teams
Teams.description: Auto-balance the confirmed roster into 2 teams. You can manually adjust afterwards.
Teams.confirmUnlock: Unlocking will delete the teams and reopen the roster. Continue?
Teams.warnSingleGk: Warning: Only one goalkeeper — one team will play without one.
Teams.warnOddCount: Warning: Odd number of players — one team has one extra.
Teams.waitingForMinPlayers: Once min players is reached you can build teams ({current}/{min}).

Events.cancelDescription: Provide a reason; all participants will be notified.
Events.cancelReasonPlaceholder: Pitch closed, bad weather, not enough players…
Events.title: Title
Events.timezoneHint: Times are stored in Europe/Warsaw time zone (where matches happen).
Events.minPlayersHint: Below this, the event is auto-cancelled.
Events.rosterPlaceholder: Coming in Phase 4 — players pick a position and join.
Events.chatPlaceholder: Coming in Phase 5 — real-time event chat room.
Events.emptyFeed: No upcoming matches match these filters.
Events.emptyFeedHint: Loosen the filters or create your own match.
Events.noVenuesHint: A venue must be registered before you can create a match. Contact the admin.

Venues.title: Venues
Venues.subtitle: {count} venues
Venues.emptyForCity: No venues registered for this city yet.
Venues.eventsTeaser: Events at this venue will be listed in Phase 3.

Profile.title: Profile
Profile.bioPlaceholder: Tell people a bit about yourself…

CommandPalette.title: Command palette
CommandPalette.placeholder: Find a page, run an action…

Errors.rate_limited: Too many requests. Please try again in a minute.
Errors.auth_failed: Session not found. Please refresh the page.
Errors.forbidden: You don't have permission for this action.

Error.title: Something went wrong
Error.description: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again.

NotFound.title: Page not found
NotFound.description: The page you're looking for doesn't exist.
